title: Tragacantha expansa
taxonomy: Tragacantha expansa is classified in the kingdom Plantae, specifically within the family Fabaceae and the genus Astragalus. However, it is also known as a synonym for Astragalus expansus, indicating its classification may vary across different sources. The plant is further classified as belonging to the order Fabales and the subclass Rosidae. Its classification reflects its membership in the legume family, characterized by its fruit and leaf structure. This classification is based on the plant's botanical characteristics and evolutionary relationships.
